_documentation.description: GW2职业数据统一配置文件
_documentation._usage: 此文件为职业数据的唯一真实来源，前后端共享

_structure.professions: 职业数组，包含所有核心职业和精英特长
_structure.name: 职业英文标识符（唯一键）
_structure.core: 职业核心配置（elite specialization 特有）

Dragonhunter.description: Dragonhunter provides strong ranged DPS with crossbow and defensive traps.

Firebrand.description: Firebrand offers powerful team support with tomes and quickness.

Willbender.description: Willbender delivers fast melee DPS with scimitar and active virtues.

Luminary.description: Luminary provides hybrid support with radiant fire and light mechanics.

Berserker.description: Berserker unleashes burst damage with dual daggers and rage overload.

Spellbreaker.description: Spellbreaker counters enemy spells with meditation and full counter skills.

Bladesworn.description: Bladesworn combines melee with dragon slash and gunnery systems.

Paragon.description: Paragon provides team support with dragon hunter-like protective chants.

Scrapper.description: Scrapper offers team support with hammer and fountain gyros.

Holosmith.description: Holosmith deals high DPS with photon forge and sword skills.

Mechanist.description: Mechanist provides ranged support with mech and rifle.

Amalgam.description: Amalgam combines alchemy and machinery for versatile combat.

Druid.description: Druid provides potent healing with celestial form and warhorn.

Soulbeast.description: Soulbeast merges with pet for melee DPS with longbow.

Untamed.description: Untamed unleashes beast instincts with hammer and unleashed mechanics.

Galeshot.description: Galeshot provides ranged DPS with whirlwind bow and arrow resources.

Daredevil.description: Daredevil excels in melee with staff and extra rolls.

Deadeye.description: Deadeye provides precision rifle damage with mark system.

Specter.description: Specter offers support with shadow scepter and barrier skills.

Antiquary.description: Antiquary blends historical artifacts with deceptive combat techniques.

Tempest.description: Tempest provides team support with warhorn overloads.

Weaver.description: Weaver deals high DPS with dual sword and stance skills.

Catalyst.description: Catalyst offers DPS with hammer and orb buffs.

Evoker.description: Evoker provides healing with spirit minions and nature magic.

Chronomancer.description: Chronomancer provides team support with shield and continuum split.

Mirage.description: Mirage deals ambush DPS with axe and illusion cloak.

Virtuoso.description: Virtuoso provides ranged DPS with mental daggers.

Troubadour.description: Troubadour offers support with harp and note-based magic.

Reaper.description: Reaper delivers melee DPS with greatsword and shroud.

Scourge.description: Scourge provides support with torch and sand barriers.

Harbinger.description: Harbinger deals ranged DPS with pistol and reagent skills.

Ritualist.description: Ritualist offers support with spirit summoning and rituals.

Herald.description: Herald provides support with dragon stance and facet skills.

Renegade.description: Renegade deals DPS with krait-like legendary stance.

Vindicator.description: Vindicator delivers melee DPS with greatsword and dodge mechanics.

Conduit.description: Conduit offers support with cosmic energy and pact skills.
